# F027. News Shock Filter + Momentum Engine

## Positioning

This candidate is the event-aware complement to F009: instead of just scoring sentiment, it blocks momentum when the news flow says the market is being repriced. It is a guardrail-first design for noisy headlines and shock-heavy sessions.

## Reference Basis

- [FinBERT Financial Sentiment Analysis](../../references/papers/5_01_FinBERT_Financial_Sentiment_Analysis.pdf) - sentiment baseline for event classification
- [FinGPT Open Source Financial LLMs](../../references/papers/5_02_FinGPT_Open_Source_Financial_LLMs.pdf) - finance-LLM event extraction
- [Large Language Models in Finance A Survey](../../references/papers/5_11_Large_Language_Models_in_Finance_A_Survey.pdf) - current finance-LLM context
- [Bayesian Online Changepoint Detection](../../references/papers/0710.3742_bayesian_online_changepoint_detection.pdf) - change-point framing for shock detection

## Repo Anchors

### Operational Guardrails

Shared safety and execution rails used by every candidate before a signal can touch capital.
- [src/risk/manager.py](../../../src/risk/manager.py) - pre-trade risk gate and position haircut
- [src/brokers/paper.py](../../../src/brokers/paper.py) - paper-safe broker adapter
- [src/monitoring/health.py](../../../src/monitoring/health.py) - freshness, heartbeat, and kill-switch checks
- [src/backtest/engine.py](../../../src/backtest/engine.py) - deterministic offline backtest runner
- [src/backtest/matching_engine.py](../../../src/backtest/matching_engine.py) - queue-aware synthetic fill model
- [scripts/monitor_health.py](../../../scripts/monitor_health.py) - runtime health loop and stale-data monitor

### News and Event Stack

Stream or replay news inputs, event timestamps, and sentiment features for event-aware trading.
- [src/ingestion/websocket_client.py](../../../src/ingestion/websocket_client.py) - replay/stream ingestion for event-driven inputs
- [src/ingestion/loader.py](../../../src/ingestion/loader.py) - news or preprocessed corpus loading
- [src/features/builder.py](../../../src/features/builder.py) - event feature construction
- [src/models/lgbm.py](../../../src/models/lgbm.py) - event classifier or event score model

### HFT and Intraday Stack

Replay-backed intraday ingestion and synthetic matching for jump filters and short-horizon routing.
- [src/ingestion/websocket_client.py](../../../src/ingestion/websocket_client.py) - stream/replay event ingestion
- [src/backtest/matching_engine.py](../../../src/backtest/matching_engine.py) - intraday queue-aware matching
- [scripts/monitor_health.py](../../../scripts/monitor_health.py) - stream freshness and heartbeat supervision

## Data / Feature Bundle

- Use news, sentiment, and price context on the same event clock.
- Join the shock features with the intraday or end-of-day market data through the shared feature builder.
- Keep the replay stream available so the filter can be exercised without a live broker.

## Execution Path

- Allow momentum trades only when the shock filter stays calm.
- Use the event score to cut exposure before the momentum leg fires.
- Route the decision through the same paper-safe and health-checked path used by the rest of the repo.

## Risk Controls

- Be conservative about duplicate articles and delayed headlines.
- Do not let macro headlines masquerade as stock-specific shocks.
- Freeze the engine when stream freshness or broker heartbeat is broken.

## Validation Gates

- Compare event-day drawdown and turnover against F009 and F001.
- Check whether the filter reduces crash exposure without destroying normal momentum performance.
- Replay the captured fixture and confirm the filter stays deterministic across replays.

## Archive Triggers

- Archive if the shock filter is noisier than the sentiment score it was supposed to improve.
- Archive if duplicate news handling or stale headlines break the logic.
- Archive if the filter becomes too conservative to trade.

## Next Step

Use this as the news-shock template for a future intraday event router.
